officeAttendance.notRecorded: You haven't recorded your attendance today.

officeAttendance.cannotClockInNonWorkingDay: You can only clock in on a working day.

holiday.impactOfficeOpenNormal: Office attendance remains active as normal.

errors.unauthorized: You are not authorized to perform this action.

errors.photoRequired: Attendance photo is required to clock in.

errors.attendanceCompleted: Office attendance has already been completed for this schedule window.
errors.clockOutGraceExpired: Clock-out is only allowed up to 4 hours after the scheduled end time.

leave.title: Leave Requests

reasonDescription.sick: Sick leave without documentation will be converted to Annual Leave deduction during manager approval.
reasonDescription.family_marriage: 3 days paid leave for employee's marriage.
reasonDescription.family_child_marriage: 2 days paid leave for child's marriage.
reasonDescription.family_child_circumcision_baptism: 2 days paid leave for child's ceremony.
reasonDescription.family_death: 2 days paid leave for death of immediate family (parent, in-law, or child).
reasonDescription.family_spouse_death: 2 days paid leave starting from date of death. Leave must be taken consecutively.
reasonDescription.special_maternity: 3 months paid leave in total before childbirth and after childbirth.
reasonDescription.special_miscarriage: 1.5 months paid leave for recovery after miscarriage. Medical documentation required.
reasonDescription.special_paternity: 2 days paid leave for husband during childbirth or miscarriage of spouse.
reasonDescription.special_emergency: For urgent or unexpected situations. This leave is deducted from Annual Leave and requires HOD approval.
reasonDescription.annual: 12 working days per year after completing 12 months of service. Used for personal purposes such as vacation or rest. Leave balance is deducted based on working days taken.

leave.attachmentHint: You can attach up to 4 files.

attachmentType.title: Select attachment type
attachmentType.message: Choose the file type to attach

leave.cancelConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to cancel this leave request?

validation.invalidRange: End date must be after or equal to start date
validation.attachmentRequiredForSick: At least 1 attachment is required for sick leave

leave.attachmentRequiredForSickHint: At least 1 attachment is required for sick leave.
leave.attachmentRequiredForMiscarriageHint: Medical documentation is required for miscarriage leave.
